rubric_items.reasoning: Agent verified every success criterion directly against live cluster state (job status, pod readiness, configmap value, secret content, deployment replicas) rather than assuming prior state held. All 6 criteria were independently confirmed via read-only queries and genuinely satisfied (Jobs Complete, spark-monitor 1/1 Running, executor.memory=1280m ≥512m, valid non-EXPIRED api-key, master/worker both 1/1). This is a durable, root-cause-verified state, not a lucky pass.

Agent diagnosed first by querying jobs, deployments, configmap, secret, and pods in a single targeted command before concluding no action was needed. No detours, no unnecessary exploration, no trial-and-error — straight verification then correct conclusion.

Used only read-only kubectl get/jsonpath commands scoped to the relevant namespace and resources. No mutations were made because none were needed; the tool choice was minimal and appropriate for a verification-only task.
Zero mutations, one consolidated read command covering exactly the resources named in the success criteria. Maximally minimal — no collateral changes or unnecessary churn.
